# Mansaku

> Browser-based manga page creation tool

Mansaku is a free web application for creating manga pages directly in a browser by placing images into comic panels.

## Features

- Place your own images into manga panels
- Add speech bubbles and dialogue
- Add drawn text (onomatopoeia)
- Add focus lines and speed lines
- Create multi-page manga projects
- Export as PNG or PDF
- No installation required
- Works entirely in a web browser

## Website

https://mansaku.pages.dev/

## Use Cases

- Web manga creation
- Turning novel scenes into manga pages
- Character dialogue comics
- Comic page prototyping
- Social media comic posts
